description: Gear up and hone your gaming skills with the Dallas Maverick Basketball from spalding. Made of composite leather and with absolute gaming technology, this is one of the best basketballs you can ever own to up the ante of your skills. Made of composite leather for durability Nubs throughout the ball surface offering absolute grip and great game characteristics Wide channels that ensures great bounce Brand name, team name and NBA printed for style Care Wipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dust Store in a clean, dry place, preferably inside a basketball bag
